case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS WILSON, LISSA G.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $560.66 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, LISSA G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, LISSA G. $560.66 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $602.66 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, LISSA G.
